Motivation

In pipeline parallelism (PP), the last rank sends sampled next_token_ids to rank 0 after every forward pass. However, for chunked prefill requests that are not in their final chunk, process_batch_result_prefill only decrements a counter (inflight_middle_chunks -= 1) and completely discar

CFG Parallel Logic: The parallelism_type property returns StageParallelismType.CFG_PARALLEL when enable_

sglang.title: [PD] Fix cross-rank queue divergence by gating metadata readiness before all-reduce
sglang.author: ShangmingCai
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation
When poll_and_all_reduce returns KVPoll.Success, it only confirms KV cache transfer completion. The data written via a separate RDMA op may not have landed on all ranks yet. If one rank sees metadata ready and removes the request from its queue while another rank keeps it, the queues dive

The normal prefill and decode paths conver

What
Adds --disaggregation-transfer-backend mooncake_tcp, a thin alias that runs the existing mooncake backend over TCP instead of RDMA. It sets MC_FORCE_TCP=1 (so mooncake installs TcpTransport), rewrites the backend to mooncake, and skips RDMA HCA selection.
Why
Provides a no-RDMA path for PD disa

Add a general schedule_stream.wait_stream(forward_stream) WAR barrier at each overlap loop top, then keep i

vllm.author: vadiklyutiy
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Problem
Running multi-node DP on 2×(4×GB300) (data_parallel_size=8, data_parallel_size_local=4, api_server_count=8, NVFP4 MoE), 5 of 79 startups failed with the same error from ApiServer_0:
(ApiServer_0 pid=...) zmq.error.ZMQError: Address already in use (addr='tcp://<master>:39381')
...
